title: Mostly Optimized (FORGE)
description: An Optimization and quality of life Modpack with lots of features. Supports 1.21.8 (1.21.9 support coming soon)
body:
# Double your FPS with Mostly Optimized!
## Heres what it does!
Mostly Optmized attempts to double your FPS with certain forge performance mods! It also has quite a lot of quality of life features like better grass, zooming, randomizable textures for texture packs, more animations, a minimap, and much more! if you don't like a certain feature in this modpack feel free to disable or add any mod / resource pack / data pack you want! Thank you to [Simply Optmized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), and [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected) for the inspiration
# Downloading Vanilla Tweaks

### What is Vanilla Tweaks?
Vanilla Tweaks is a collection of resource packs that lets you choose the changes you want to make to your game, most of these features are quality of life and bug fixes, there are a variety of changes to be made to your game like makes ores have borders and much more.

### How To Download Vanilla Tweaks!
Vanilla Tweaks is not in Mostly Optimized FORGE by default because its's not on modrinth to Download Vanilla Tweaks Visit the site [vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
and pick the changes you want to be made! Alternatively you can use the mod VTdownloader To Download The a Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack Directly ingame, just press the Download VT Resource Pack Button to download a pack and from there you can choose the changes you want to be made (VTDownloader is in Mostly Optmized by default). But I recommend you to just download it manully.

# Here are the Projects! (24)
### The Mods!
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ESF] Enity Sound Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
- 3D Skin Layers
- Cherished Worlds
- Chunky
- Clumps (by lullaby)
- Clumps (by jaredlll08)
- Entity Culling
- FPS Reducer
- Just Zoom
- Konkrete
- No chat Reports
- Not Enough Animations
- Simple Voice Chat
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map

### The Resource Packs
- (Bee's) Fancy Crops
- Bare Bones
- Even Better Enchants
- Fast Better Grass
- Fresh Animations
- New Glowing Ores
- Vanilla Tweaks (NOT DIRECTLY IN MOSTLY OPTIMIZED DOWNLOAD FROM [HERE](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/))
